title: Modern Common Chinese Components (Grouped Variants)
standard_title_zh: 现代常用字部件及部件名称规范
scope: Grouped component forms for 3,500 common modern Chinese characters.
grouping_rule: Each entry groups all component variants that share the same 部件组号.
sort_note: Frequency-ranked browsing uses the sum of official occurrence_count values across grouped variant forms, with ties broken by ascending group_id.
presentation_note: The dataset stores grouped Chinese forms and source example characters. Readings, zhuyin, English meanings, and example words may need live assistant help at render time.

sources.note: Provides clean names, group ids, stroke metadata, and component attributes.
Provides the component-form glyph strings and source example characters keyed by component sequence number.
MOE release summary for GF 0014-2009; used to verify the official 441-group / 514-component counts.
